refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements with traceability, and manage updates including baselines and calibration history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing into derivation, recording, and management clarifies distinct functional concerns and supports traceability and history maintenance as required by constraints.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets traceable to worksite inputs and a maintained history of baseline and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

candidate_dps: Algorithmic derivation engine using worksite data inputs
Structured performance requirements database with version control
Update management process with baseline and calibration tracking
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated performance requirements management system combining derivation algorithms, traceable recording, and update management

potential_sources: Tight coupling between derivation algorithms and data inputs
Version control tightly coupled with update management
coupling_check.notes: The integrated DP logically groups related functions to minimize cross-module dependencies and supports traceability.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and accuracy of worksite mission context data
Risk of data inconsistency if update management is not robust
High safety criticality requires rigorous validation of derivation algorithms
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing update management separately if complexity grows to reduce coupling.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Complete performance requirements derivation, recording, and management functionality as a centralized module

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time worksite mission context data for derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance requirements to other system components

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports update synchronization and calibration history sharing

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as all related functions are centralized; low diffusion risk.
Poor containment; would require duplicating logic or data, increasing diffusion risk.
Not suitable; unrelated to performance requirements derivation and management.
Partial relevance for safety alerts but poor containment for full functionality.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing the performance requirements derivation and management in NGHE Solution minimizes diffusion and supports traceability and update history.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too large or complex
Interface dependencies on Telemetry and Network Link must be robust to avoid data loss
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module complexity and consider splitting update management if needed; ensure interface robustness.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly decomposes the original requirement into manageable sub-functions; DP selection logically addresses these with integrated solution.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized containment in NGHE Solution module
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support assignment to NGHE Solution; interfaces are well defined and limited.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via documented traceability and history records within NGHE Solution module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of functional requirements to NGHE Solution module with defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Review complexity of NGHE Solution module periodically
Validate interface robustness especially for Telemetry and Network Link

decision.justification: Current level of decomposition and assignments meet requirements, constraints, and safety criticality with clear traceability and manageable containment.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Worksite mission context data is accurate and timely
NGHE Solution module can handle integration complexity
open_risks: Data inconsistency risk if update management is not robust
evidence_needed: Validation of derivation algorithms under safety critical conditions
Demonstration of traceability and update history maintenance
